hero.page_label: 🚀 From Idea to MVP in Weeks
hero.title:
Stop refining the pitch deck.
Start shipping product.
hero.subtitle: We build MVPs, mobile apps, and cloud platforms for early-stage startups — fixed price, no equity, AI-augmented delivery. Transparent pricing from day one, not a quote-only mystery.

items.title: Cross-Platform Mobile Apps
items.desc: Ship to iOS and Android simultaneously from a single Flutter codebase. We use AI-assisted development to compress what used to take 3 months into 4-8 weeks — without cutting corners on code quality or native performance.

items.title: Web Applications & SaaS
items.desc: Production-grade web platforms built with Next.js and React. SEO-optimized from launch, architected for scale, and deployed on serverless infrastructure so your hosting costs stay near zero until you have real traction.

items.title: AI as a Product Feature
items.desc: Integrate LLMs, build WhatsApp bots, or add intelligent automation directly into your product. We treat AI as a tool that ships faster products, not a buzzword that inflates budgets.

items.title: Zero-to-Production Infrastructure
items.desc: Firebase, Supabase, or Cloudflare Workers — serverless architecture that keeps your cloud bill near zero while you find product-market fit, then scales without re-architecture when you do.

industries.title: FinTech & SaaS
industries.desc: Subscription billing, payment gateway integrations, and secure data handling — built to comply with financial standards from day one, not patched in later.

industries.title: D2C & E-Commerce
industries.desc: High-conversion storefronts, inventory management, and automated fulfillment workflows for direct-to-consumer brands that need to ship fast and iterate faster.

industries.title: HealthTech & EdTech
industries.desc: Compliance-ready infrastructure, real-time video, and user-centric interfaces for platforms where trust, uptime, and data privacy are non-negotiable.

cta.title: Ready to ship your MVP?
cta.description: Book a free scoping call. We'll review your idea and give you a fixed quote within 48 hours — no equity ask, no hourly billing surprises.
